displayTitle: Episode III: Revenge of the Sith #2
synopsis: Based on the screenplay by George Lucas—the official comics adaptation of the most anticipated of the Star Wars films! The action of the Clone Wars comes to a dramatic conclusion, and events are put in place for A New Hope. Battles rage in space, armies clash on alien worlds, heroes become martyrs, and friends become enemies—and the galaxy is forever changed!
